title: Freight Bill Processing Automation: Complete Guide for Logistics Companies
metaTitle: Freight Bill Processing Automation Guide for Logistics Companies
metaDescription: Automate freight bill data extraction from carrier invoices. Convert PDFs to Excel with AI-powered field extraction for logistics operations.
h1: Freight Bill Processing Automation: Complete Guide for Logistics Companies

hero.headline: Automate Freight Bill Processing for Thousands of Carrier Invoices
hero.subheadline: Convert freight bills from PDFs and images to structured Excel spreadsheets using AI-powered field extraction. Process carrier invoices in batches with 99%+ accuracy on clear documents.

summary: Freight bill processing automation transforms how logistics companies handle carrier invoices by converting PDF freight bills and scanned documents into structured Excel or CSV files. This eliminates manual data entry for freight charges, delivery dates, BOL numbers, and carrier details across thousands of documents.
whoItsFor: Logistics companies processing hundreds of carrier invoices monthly
Third-party logistics providers managing multiple freight bills daily
Freight brokers handling diverse carrier billing formats
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing freight bills from multiple carriers with different formats
Converting scanned or PDF freight invoices to Excel for accounting systems
Automating BOL number and freight charge extraction from carrier documents
supportedInputs: Digital photos of freight bills taken with mobile devices
expectedOutputs: Excel spreadsheets with freight charges, dates, and BOL numbers
CSV files with carrier details and shipping information for import into logistics systems
commonChallenges: Manual entry of freight charges and BOL numbers from hundreds of carrier invoices
Converting scanned freight bills from carriers who only provide paper copies
Extracting delivery dates and freight details from inconsistent carrier billing formats
Processing freight bills quickly enough to meet payment terms and avoid late fees
howItWorksSteps: Upload freight bill PDFs or images to the processing platform
AI extracts key fields like BOL numbers, freight charges, delivery dates, and carrier information
Review extracted data and customize fields specific to your freight bill requirements
Download structured Excel or CSV files ready for import into accounting or logistics systems
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles both digital PDF freight bills and scanned documents from various carriers
Batch processing capabilities essential for logistics companies managing thousands of invoices
Custom field selection allows extraction of specific freight bill data like accessorial charges
Pipeline automation enables recurring processing of freight bills from regular carriers
limitations: Accuracy depends on freight bill quality - faded or poor scans may need manual review
Complex multi-page freight bills with nested charge breakdowns may require verification
Handwritten freight bills have limited recognition compared to typed carrier invoices

faq.question: Can this process freight bills from different carriers with varying formats?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI adapts to different carrier invoice formats and you can customize field extraction for specific freight bill layouts and data requirements.

faq.question: How does batch processing work for hundreds of freight bills?
faq.answer: Upload multiple freight bill files at once and the system processes them simultaneously, creating one Excel row per freight bill with all extracted data.

faq.question: What freight bill fields can be extracted automatically?
faq.answer: Common fields include BOL numbers, freight charges, fuel surcharges, delivery dates, carrier names, origin/destination, and weight information.

faq.question: How accurate is the extraction on scanned freight bills?
faq.answer: Clear scanned freight bills achieve 99%+ accuracy, while faded or poor quality scans may require manual verification of extracted data.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
99%+ accuracy on clear freight bill documents
Free tier available to test with your freight bills
Plans starting at $49/month for regular freight bill processing
exampleUseCases: Converting weekly freight bills from 20+ carriers into single Excel file for accounts payable
Processing scanned freight invoices from smaller carriers who don't provide digital copies
Extracting BOL numbers and charges from freight bills for customer billing reconciliation
Automating fuel surcharge and accessorial charge extraction from complex freight invoices
